content: propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Coffee Shop Catch-Up", message="Hey Juniper, I was thinking about stopping by the coffee shop today. Let's catch up and chat for a bit. I've been feeling a bit isolated lately and could use some good conversation.", proposal="I'd like to meet at the coffee shop to chat and catch up. It would be great to have some good conversation and feel less isolated.", invited_persons=["Juniper Liang"], time="Y2020-W01-activity-D1", location="Corner Coffee Shop")

contact(message="Hey Juniper, I've been feeling a bit isolated lately and could use some good conversation. Would you be up for catching up at the coffee shop this week? I'd love to hear what's on your mind.", to="Juniper Liang")

propose_joint_activity(activity_name="Library Book Club", message="Hey everyone, I was thinking about starting a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you. Would you be interested in joining?", proposal="I'd like to start a small book club at the library. I've been reading a lot lately and would love to discuss some of these books with you. It would be great to have some good conversation and a change of scenery.", invited_persons=["Leo", "Alex Medina", "Juniper Liang"], time="Y2020-W02-activity-D3", location="Library")
